title: Blackstone高管：AI将颠覆会计法律金融等规则型业务
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Rohan Paul
@rohanpaul_ai
Blackstone President and COO Jon Gray made a very good point.
Any rule-based businesses, like accounting, legal, finance, will be completely disrupted by AI. 🎯
e.g. JPMorgan dropped proxy advisors for shareholder votes, replacing them with AI.
Bloomberg TV
00:00

@rohanpaul_ai
Jun 13
Vinod Khosla’s warning for India's BPO in the age AI:
The traditional IT services and BPO business “will be gone”
But India can still win if it shifts to deploying AI.

discovery_record.discovery_title: Blackstone高管：AI将颠覆会计法律金融等规则型业务
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Blackstone总裁Jon Gray指出，任何基于规则的业务（如会计、法律、金融）都将被AI彻底颠覆，例如JPMorgan已用AI取代代理顾问处理股东投票。引用Vinod Khosla对印度的警告：传统IT服务和BPO业务"将消失"，但若转向AI部署仍可获胜。

key_excerpts.text: Blackstone总裁Jon Gray指出，任何基于规则的业务（如会计、法律、金融）都将被AI彻底颠覆，例如JPMorgan已用AI取代代理顾问处理股东投票。引用Vinod Khosla对印度的警告：传统IT服务和BPO业务"将消失"，但若转向AI部署仍可获胜。
Post Log in Sign up Post Rohan Paul @rohanpaul_ai Blackstone President and COO Jon Gray made a very good point.
Any rule-based businesses, like accounting, legal, finance, will be completely disrupted by AI.
JPMorgan dropped proxy advisors for shareholder votes, replacing them with AI.

case_details: Blackstone总裁Jon Gray指出，任何基于规则的业务（如会计、法律、金融）都将被AI彻底颠覆，例如JPMorgan已用AI取代代理顾问处理股东投票。引用Vinod Khosla对印度的警告：传统IT服务和BPO业务"将消失"，但若转向AI部署仍可获胜。
before_after_clues: 可能涉及 部署 / 集成交付 的前后变化，需要二搜补足变化前流程。
